title: EDII Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Project Officer Posts
description: The Entrepreneurship Development Institute of India (EDII) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree and Post-graduation can apply for the EDII Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
